016package org.consensusj.daemon.micronaut;
017
018import io.micronaut.context.annotation.ConfigurationProperties;
019import io.micronaut.core.bind.annotation.Bindable;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
022import org.jspecify.annotations.Nullable;
023
024import java.nio.file.Path;
025
026/**
027 * Configuration record for the daemon. Typically read from a TOML file.
028 * @param networkId  name (see {@link BitcoinNetwork#toString()} or ID string of network (see {@link BitcoinNetwork#id()}
029 * @param serverPort Port Daemon will listen on
030 * @param dataDir Path to data directory
031 * @param walletBaseName Basename of wallet files (basename-net.wallet and basename-net.spvchain)
032 */
033@ConfigurationProperties("walletd.config")
034public record BitcoinDaemonConfig(@Nullable String networkId, int serverPort, @Nullable Path dataDir,
035                                  @Bindable(defaultValue = "walletd") String walletBaseName)
036{
037    /**
038     * @return Defaults to {@link BitcoinNetwork#MAINNET}
039     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if {@link #networkId} isn't a valid name or id string.
040     */
041    public Network network() {
042        return networkId == null || networkId.isBlank()
043                ? BitcoinNetwork.MAINNET
044                : BitcoinNetwork.fromString(networkId).orElseGet(
045                            () -> BitcoinNetwork.fromIdString(networkId)
046                                .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid network: " + networkId))
047                        );
048    }
049}
